revision.comment: [[Template:今日のこよみ]]での使用を想定して作ってみた
JULIANDAYを軽量版に差し替え
ユリウス日の半日ずれを補正。条件文をシンプルに。
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#switch:({{#expr:{{JD lite|+9 hours}} + 0.5) mod 10}} |0 = 癸 |1 = 甲 |2 = 乙 |3 = 丙 |4 = 丁 |5 = 戊 |6 = 己 |7 = 庚 |8 = 辛 |9 = 壬 }}{{#switch:({{#expr:{{JD lite|+9 hours}} + 0.5) mod 12}} |0 = 丑 |1 = 寅 |2 = 卯 |3 = 辰 |4 = 巳 |5 = 午 |6 = 未 |7 = 申 |8 = 酉 |9 = 戌 |10 = 亥 |11 = 子 }}</includeonly><noinclude> [[日本標準時]] (JST) における今日の干支を表示します。
;表示例 本日の干支は[[{{今日の干支}}]]です。
[[Category:条件文]] [[Category:日本時間計算テンプレート|日]] </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#switch:{{#expr:({{JD lite|+9 hours}} + 0.5) mod 10}} |0 = 癸 |1 = 甲 |2 = 乙 |3 = 丙 |4 = 丁 |5 = 戊 |6 = 己 |7 = 庚 |8 = 辛 |9 = 壬 }}{{#switch:{{#expr:({{JD lite|+9 hours}} + 0.5) mod 12}} |0 = 丑 |1 = 寅 |2 = 卯 |3 = 辰 |4 = 巳 |5 = 午 |6 = 未 |7 = 申 |8 = 酉 |9 = 戌 |10 = 亥 |11 = 子 }}</includeonly><noinclude> [[日本標準時]] (JST) における今日の干支を表示します。
;表示例 本日の干支は[[{{今日の干支}}]]です。
[[Category:条件文]] [[Category:日本時間計算テンプレート|日]] </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#switch:{{#expr:({{JD lite|+9 hours}} + 0.5) mod 10}} |0 = 癸 |1 = 甲 |2 = 乙 |3 = 丙 |4 = 丁 |5 = 戊 |6 = 己 |7 = 庚 |8 = 辛 |9 = 壬 }}{{#switch:{{#expr:({{JD lite|+9 hours}} + 0.5) mod 12}} |0 = 丑 |1 = 寅 |2 = 卯 |3 = 辰 |4 = 巳 |5 = 午 |6 = 未 |7 = 申 |8 = 酉 |9 = 戌 |10 = 亥 |11 = 子 }}</includeonly><noinclude> [[日本標準時]] (JST) における今日の干支を表示します。
;表示例 本日の干支は[[{{今日の干支}}]]です。
[[Category:条件文]] [[Category:日本時間計算テンプレート|暦]] </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#switch:{{#expr:({{JD lite|+9 hours}} + 0.5) mod 10}} |0 = 癸 |1 = 甲 |2 = 乙 |3 = 丙 |4 = 丁 |5 = 戊 |6 = 己 |7 = 庚 |8 = 辛 |9 = 壬 }}{{#switch:{{#expr:({{JD lite|+9 hours}} + 0.5) mod 12}} |0 = 丑 |1 = 寅 |2 = 卯 |3 = 辰 |4 = 巳 |5 = 午 |6 = 未 |7 = 申 |8 = 酉 |9 = 戌 |10 = 亥 |11 = 子 }}</includeonly><noinclude> [[日本標準時]] (JST) における今日の干支を表示します。

revision.text:

revision.comment: updated to english
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#switch:{{#expr:({{JD lite|+9 hours}} + 0.5) mod 10}} |0 = Yin Water |1 = Yang Wood |2 = Yin Wood |3 = Yang Fire |4 = Yin Fire |5 = Yang Earth |6 = Yin Earth |7 = Yang Metal |8 = Yin Metal |9 = Wang Water }}{{#switch:{{#expr:({{JD lite|+9 hours}} + 0.5) mod 12}} |0 = Ox |1 = Tiger |2 = Rabbit |3 = Dragon |4 = Snake |5 = Horse |6 = Goat |7 = Monkey |8 = Rooster |9 = Dog |10 = Pig |11 = Rat }}</includeonly><noinclude> [[日本標準時]] (JST) における今日の干支を表示します。
;表示例 本日の干支は[[{{今日の干支}}]]です。
{{DEFAULTSORT:きようのえと}} [[Category:日本時間計算テンプレート|暦]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:Template:今日の干支]][[Category:Templates for the Japanese Calendar Logic Fix Attempt]]
[[Category:Ja import failed]] </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#switch:{{#expr:({{JD lite|+9 hours}} + 0.5) mod 10}} |0 = Yin Water |1 = Yang Wood |2 = Yin Wood |3 = Yang Fire |4 = Yin Fire |5 = Yang Earth |6 = Yin Earth |7 = Yang Metal |8 = Yin Metal |9 = Yang Water }} {{#switch:{{#expr:({{JD lite|+9 hours}} + 0.5) mod 12}} |0 = Ox |1 = Tiger |2 = Rabbit |3 = Dragon |4 = Snake |5 = Horse |6 = Goat |7 = Monkey |8 = Rooster |9 = Dog |10 = Pig |11 = Rat }}</includeonly><noinclude> [[日本標準時]] (JST) における今日の干支を表示します。
;表示例 本日の干支は[[{{今日の干支}}]]です。
{{citation needed|きようのえと}} [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates|暦]] [[ja:Template:今日の干支]][[Category:Templates for the Japanese Calendar Logic Fix Attempt]] [[Category:fix the bottom thing]]
</noinclude> {{translated page|ja|Template:今日の干支|version=94275425|comment=Imported full ja history}}

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Current_Sexagenary_English here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Current_Sexagenary_English for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <includeonly>{{#switch:{{#expr:({{JD lite|+9 hours}} + 0.5) mod 10}} |0 = Yin Water |1 = Yang Wood |2 = Yin Wood |3 = Yang Fire |4 = Yin Fire |5 = Yang Earth |6 = Yin Earth |7 = Yang Metal |8 = Yin Metal |9 = Yang Water }} {{#switch:{{#expr:({{JD lite|+9 hours}} + 0.5) mod 12}} |0 = Ox |1 = Tiger |2 = Rabbit |3 = Dragon |4 = Snake |5 = Horse |6 = Goat |7 = Monkey |8 = Rooster |9 = Dog |10 = Pig |11 = Rat }}</includeonly><noinclude>
